subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is a leaf that hath yearned for Thy countenance, that hath been stirred by the breezes of Thy bounty, and that hath been gathered unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه ورقه التی ارادت وجهک و تحرکت من اریاح فضلک و اخذها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God
